name: Lazy Day Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Spaghetti sauce (18 tsp Ground beef, cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cottage cheese, shredded mozzarella, dried parsley, onion powder, dried basil, and pepper until well blended.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the spaghetti sauce with cooked ground beef.
3. In a 12" x 8" x 2-inch baking dish, spread 3/4 cup of meat sauce.
4. Layer 3 uncooked lasagna noodles on top.
5. Spread half of the cheese mixture and 1 1/2 cups of meat sauce over the noodles.
6. Cover with 3 more noodles, then the remaining meat sauce.
7. Spread the remaining cheese mixture over the top layer.
8. Top with the final 3 noodles and the remaining meat sauce.
9. Pour water around the edges of the casserole.
10. Cover tightly with foil.
11. Bake in a 375°F oven for 45 minutes.
12. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes, or until the noodles are tender. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
